channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dead fox by the gate opposite the allotment on the left., 30th March
item.description:
Dead fox by the gate opposite the allotment on the left.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Recreation Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On road outside 49 Malvern Road, 30th March
item.description:
Pothole c0.5m by 0.5m deep enough to make car being driven slowly bounce and shudder when going over it. Please repair

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Reopen 9204225, 30th March
item.description:
This casecwas closed overnight. I raised this at the weekend. I do not belueve there has been a site inspection as dimply no tome to make a judgement. Please aend someone to inspect and fix these large potholes which are deep enough to meet your cruteria.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35, Priestlands Park Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked chute, 30th March
item.description:
The chute at 11 - 20 Dunton Court SE23 3PJ is blocked. Please can we unblock the chute.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping again outside playground, 30th March
item.description:
Large amount of building waste flytipped last night

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Inver Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog Waste Bin on Maude Road SE5, 30th March
item.description:
The Dog Waste bin is full and overflowing onto the pavement. This could potentially be a health hazard.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Maude Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 37 Malvern Road - The Mayflower takeaway, 30th March
item.description:
Potholes and broken road surface about 2 metres square. Road surface so uneven that a car being driven slowly bounces and shudders when going along this section

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole crnr of North St/Woolwich Rd B'Heath, 30th March
item.description:
Pothole crnr of North St/Woolwich Rd B'Heath. Caller says this is if you was coming down from the clocktower and where the buses go round. Caller uses a mobilty scooter, says she tried to avoid this when crossing over the road but she hit the wall and hurt her back - reported to Accidents/Claims AAC-001134
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woolwich Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stolen motorbike, 30th March
item.description:
Stolen motorbike smells of petrol

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Crown Woods Way, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Political party stall blocking the pavement, 30th March
item.description:
Political party stall blocking the pavement. Should this have a license?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thornton's Alley, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On road outside 31-33 Malvern Road - The Cedar, 30th March
item.description:
Potholes and broken road surface along and across road, about 4 metres square. Deep enough/uneven enough to make car bounce and shudder when driving slowly along road. Please repair

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pile of bin bags outside 32 Sach Road, 30th March
item.description:
Hello, I’m reporting an ongoing issue outside 32 and 36 Sach Road. There is an unacceptable amount of bin bags and broken furniture left on the street, blocking the pavement. This situation has clearly been ignored for some time, and the level of disregar

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sach Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Faded road markings on roundabouts, 30th March
item.description:
Hello, the road markings are so faded they are almost non existent, invisible on both Fish Roundabout and the Horse roundabout in Erith. It makes it very dangerous to drive on these roundabout, noone understands where the lanes are. Could you please draw the lane markings on the round abouts? This is particularly important because there are many learners drivers taking these rounds due to proximity of Driving Testing Center in Erith. Thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On road outside 27 Malvern Road - Saj and Juice, 30th March
item.description:
Potholes and broken road surface along and across road, about 3 metres square. Deep enough to cause car driving slowly to bounce and shudder. Please repair

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on Windus Rd, 30th March
item.description:
3 examples of fly tipping in this area at Kyverdale junction, first seen on Saturday afternoon. Builders bags , toys and household goods

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oldhill Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please empty overflowing bin, 30th March
item.description:
The bin at Barnes Cray Road end of footpath 106 in Crayford is overflowing. Please can you arrange for it to be emptied

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Barnes Cray Road, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On road outside 23 Malvern Road - Lanzhou takeaway, 30th March
item.description:
Broken road surface across and along road, about 2 metres square. Uneven road surface causes car being driven slowly to bounce and shudder. Please repair

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflow bin at 69 Mount pleasant lane, 30th March
item.description:
At 69 Mount pleasant lane the bin is consistently overflowing, and the bin bags are not properly closed, which is attracting animals and causing litter to spread across the street.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mount Pleasant Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On road outside 21 Malvern Road - residential flats, 30th March
item.description:
Potholes pitting the road surface about 3 metres square. Deep enough to cause car to bounce and shudder when driven slowly along road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: General rubbish, 30th March
item.description:
Rubbish along Cray Avenue on the grass verge along the fencing of P J Suplies which needs clearing all the way down the part of the verge. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cray Avenue, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
